description: Product Catalog service ecosystem — manages item listings, taxonomy, search indexing, and pricing for the Omni-Mart platform.

services.name: Catalog API
services.description: REST gateway for product CRUD, bulk imports, and search-delegated queries.

services.name: Search Indexer
services.description: Consumes catalog change-data-capture events and maintains the Elasticsearch cluster for full-text product search.

services.name: Pricing Engine
services.description: Computes real-time price including promotions, clearance rules, and regional tax adjustments.

services.name: Storefront BFF
services.description: Backend-for-frontend aggregating catalog, pricing, and inventory for the web storefront.

artifacts.title: Catalog API – Service Ownership Registry
artifacts.content: Catalog API is owned by the Catalog Team (T1 critical). On-call rotation: catalog-oncall@omnimart.dev. Escalation path: Catalog Team Lead → VP Engineering. The service handles ~12k RPM at peak and processes bulk-import jobs nightly.

artifacts.title: Catalog API – Deployment Runbook
artifacts.content: Pre-deploy: verify Search Indexer CDC lag < 500ms. Coordinate with Search Platform Team if schema migration is included. Post-deploy: confirm product-detail page renders correctly on Storefront BFF. Rollback trigger: error rate > 1% on /products endpoint within 10 min.

artifacts.title: Catalog → Search Indexer Dependency Spec
artifacts.content: Catalog API publishes CatalogItemChanged events to Kafka topic 'catalog.changes'. Search Indexer consumes this topic with consumer-group 'search-idx-cg'. If Catalog API schema changes, Search Indexer mapping must be updated first to avoid ingestion failures. Downstream impact: stale search results on Storefront and Mobile BFF if indexer lags > 2 min.

artifacts.title: Pricing Engine Integration Guide
artifacts.content: Catalog API calls Pricing Engine synchronously on /products/:id for real-time price. Pricing Engine depends on Promo Service for active promotions. Failure mode: if Pricing Engine is unavailable, Catalog API falls back to cached base price (stale up to 15 min). Blast radius on Pricing Engine outage: incorrect prices shown on Storefront and Cart.

artifacts.title: Search Indexer – Post-Incident Review (PIR-2026-018)
artifacts.content: Incident: Search Indexer fell 45 min behind on catalog CDC events after a Catalog API bulk-import job unexpectedly doubled event throughput. Root cause: Indexer consumer had fixed partition count (4) while event volume spiked to 8x normal. Resolution: auto-scaling consumer group, partition count increased to 12. Lesson: coordinate bulk-import scheduling with Search Platform Team.
